title: Crisp Indian-Style Fried Noodles
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring crispy fried noodles, inspired by Indian flavors. This quick and easy recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1/2 cup vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1/2 cup crisp and stir-fry until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove crispy elements from the wok and set aside.
Add 2 tbsp rasam to the wok and stir-fry noodles until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add soy sauce, sugar, chili flakes, and salt to the wok and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Return crispy elements to the wok and stir-fry for an additional minute.
Transfer noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
